mapper.select: SELECT r.id, CONCAT(cm.brand_name, ' ', cm.model_name) AS vehicleInfo, COALESCE(u.real_name, u.nickname, u.username) AS userName, u.iphone AS userPhone, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.create_time AS createTime, r.status, r.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, r.likes_count AS likesCount, r.comments_count AS commentsCount, r.featured FROM review r LEFT JOIN `order` o ON r.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN car_info c ON o.car_id = c.car_id LEFT JOIN car_models cm ON c.model_id = cm.model_id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
